How the model works

Submit any problem — no cost. Tell me what's going on in whatever words you have. You don't need to know what the solution is or what category it falls into.

Get a clear, actionable plan — free. I'll return a plain-English breakdown: what I'd do, how long it takes, and what it costs. AI-assisted triage makes this possible at no charge.

Pay only to execute. You approve the plan first. Only pay if and when you want me to build it. No surprises, ever.

Why this exists

This isn't a service offering.
It's a worldview.

ZeisWorks wasn't built to serve a market category. It was built because of a specific experience: watching a brilliant, decades-old family business struggle to know where it was heading.

The company had survived for over 60 years — not because they had dashboards or automation, but because the people running it were good at what they do. They operated on instinct, relationships, and hard work. But the world changed around them faster than anyone warned them it would. Not in a way that threatened the business immediately — but in a way that made it harder to see clearly. Harder to answer: where are we heading?

What they needed wasn't a consultant who'd rip everything out and replace it. They needed someone who understood that the business has a soul — that the relationships matter — and who also knew how to actually fix things.

That's what ZeisWorks is. And it's nearly impossible to copy.

Sound familiar?

You've built something real.
Parts of it haven't kept up.

Most established businesses have at least one thing — a process, a system, a spreadsheet — that works, but barely. You know it. You've been meaning to fix it. I help you actually fix it, without making it a bigger project than it needs to be.

I feel like we're leaving time on the table every day. I just don't know where to start fixing it.
Our data is all over the place. I can never get a straight answer out of it when I need one.
We're in Salesforce but I don't think we're really using it. Half the team doesn't even log in.
I know there's a better way to do this. I just don't have the time to figure out what it is.

Who this is for

Built for businesses that run
on relationships, not software.

I have a specific problem

"We've been doing this the same way for years. It works, but it takes longer than it should — and nobody ever has time to fix it."

You know what's broken. You just need someone who can actually fix it without turning it into a six-month project — and without needing to hire an agency or an in-house IT person to get it done.

Tell me what it is →

I'm not sure where to start

"I know things are changing fast. I just don't know what we should actually be doing about it — and I can't expect my team to figure that out on top of everything else."

You don't have to show up with a clear problem or know what category it falls into. That's what the free plan is for. Most people walk away with a clearer picture of where to start — even if they don't hire me.

Let's talk it through →
Not a retainer. Not a proposal process. Not a big agency. Not dependent on you knowing the right question.

The goal is never to change how your business works or replace the people who make it run. It's to make their jobs — and yours — a little easier.

Submit your problem — I'll send you a plan, free →

Recent work

Problems solved.
In plain English.

Salesforce · Custom Build

"We were maintaining a dashboard outside Salesforce just to see our own prospect history."

A client needed 10-year trend data across 12 datasets visible directly on their prospect records — something standard Salesforce reporting couldn't touch. Rather than expanding their BI stack, I built a custom Lightning component that lives natively on the prospect page. Historical data, clean layout, no tab-switching.

Completed in 4.5 hours. Replaced a recurring BI license and a Salesforce agency build that would have cost 2–3× as much.
Salesforce Lightning Components Custom Reporting

Salesforce · AI + Data

"We knew our CRM was a mess. We just didn't have anyone to fix it."

Missing fields, bad formatting, duplicates — a 2,000+ record Salesforce database that nobody trusted. I exported the data, cleaned and re-populated it using AI and custom tooling, and re-uploaded a complete, accurate set of records. What would have taken a staff member 60–100 hours of manual work was done in a fraction of the time.

Clean data, immediately usable for audience segmentation and targeted outreach.
Salesforce AI Data Cleanup

AI · Internal Tools

"HR was spending half their day answering the same questions over and over."

Employees had nowhere consistent to turn for HR and operations questions — so they emailed, messaged, or walked over to ask. I built an AI agent inside Microsoft Copilot that pulls from existing company documents to answer questions instantly, without new software or extra training. Employees get answers. HR gets their time back.

The agent also flags gaps in the documentation — so HR knows what to update before the next person has to ask.
AI Microsoft Copilot Workflow Automation

Automation · Data

"We needed to find the right partners — but that meant reviewing hundreds of websites by hand."

A client needed to evaluate 530 websites to identify the right partners for a key initiative. Manual research wasn't just slow — at the scale required, it wasn't financially viable. I built a custom web agent that scraped and compiled the relevant data from all 530 sites automatically, delivering a complete picture that simply wouldn't have been possible otherwise.

Made a previously impossible research project achievable — at a fraction of what manual work would have cost.
Automation Web Scraping Data

What this isn't

  • Not a retainer or long-term commitment
  • Not a proposal process or sales call
  • Not an agency that passes you to a junior
  • Not dependent on you knowing the right question
The plan is free — always

Tell me what's going on. I'll come back with a clear, actionable plan — what I'd do, how long, and what it costs. No charge for that part, ever.

Scoped before anything starts

You get a clear outline — what I'll do, how many hours I estimate, what the total looks like. You approve it before a single hour is billed.

You only pay for approved work

If something changes mid-project, I'll tell you before going over scope. No surprise invoices.

How it works

As simple as it should be.

The diagnosis is always free. You only pay for work you've approved.
01

Tell me what's going on

Send me a message. Describe the problem in whatever words you have — you don't need to know what the solution is or what category it falls into. No charge, no commitment.

02

You get a clear plan — free

I'll come back with a plain-English outline: what I'd do, how long it would take, and what it costs. The plan is always free. You don't agree to anything until you're comfortable.

03

I get it done

Once you approve, I build it. I'll check in if something comes up, but I don't need managing. You get the finished work handed off and ready to use.

A real person,
not an agency.

I grew up around a small business — a family company that had survived for over 60 years on instinct, relationships, and hard work. I watched it struggle to see where it was heading, not because anything was broken, but because the world changed faster than anyone warned it would.

That's why ZeisWorks exists. Not to replace how your business works or who makes it run. To bridge the gap between people who built something real and the tools that can actually help them — without the complexity, the retainers, or the agency overhead.

In my day job I serve as Director of Business Development Technology, working directly with client-facing and internal teams to improve how they operate. I've spent years translating between the people who run a business and the tools that are supposed to help them. ZeisWorks is how I bring that to small businesses directly.

No commitment required
